data.title: Trump says he will meet with Putin in Hungary after a “long and productive” call
data.description:
In a Thursday update on Truth Social, President Donald Trump announced that he and President Vladimir Putin have agreed to meet in Budapest, Hungary, following what he described as a “long and productive” phone call. The goal of the summit is to discuss possible ways to end Russia’s war in Ukraine, which is now in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-will-meet-with-putin-in-hungary/

data.title: Peaq and Dubai's VARA Collaborate on Regulatory Framework for Onchain Robotics
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, decentralized physical infrastructure protocol peaq has entered into a memorandum of understanding with Dubai’s Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) to establish a regulatory framework for onchain robotics and tokenized machines. This agreement focuses on peaq’s Machine Economy Free Zone, which serves as a controlled environment to explore the integration of robotics and artificial intelligence within decentralized networks. The collaboration also includes guidance for projects seeking VARA licenses, joint training initiatives in technology and compliance, and data sharing to support research and regulation.

Peaq, a layer-1 blockchain designed for the machine economy, facilitates a network where connected devices and robots can own assets, share data, and generate income. This initiative underpins decentralized physical infrastructure networks (DePIN) and tokenized real-world assets. VARA, established in 2022, is Dubai’s regulatory agency for cryptocurrencies and digital assets, overseeing licensing, compliance, and policy for virtual asset businesses across the emirate. The announcement follows VARA's recent strategic partnership with DMCC, Dubai’s government-backed commodities and business free zone, aimed at developing a regulatory framework for tokenized commodities.

Dubai and the United Arab Emirates have been proactive in advancing their digital assets and blockchain innovation landscape. Since VARA's inception in March 2022, the agency has played a pivotal role in transforming Dubai into a leading hub for digital assets. VARA updated its rulebook for virtual asset service providers in May, clarifying the issuance and distribution of real-world assets (RWAs). Additionally, VARA and the UAE’s Securities and Commodities Authority formed a strategic partnership in August to synchronize their regulatory approach to digital assets, extending Dubai-based licenses across the UAE.

The UAE's commitment to digital asset regulation has attracted high-net-worth crypto investors, making it a prime destination for migrating millionaires. The UAE is expected to welcome approximately 9,800 millionaires by 2025, further solidifying its position as a global leader in digital asset innovation. Chase Ergen, a board member at DeFi Technologies, anticipates that the crypto sector will become the UAE’s second-largest industry within five years. This strategic focus on digital assets underscores Dubai and the UAE's ambition to establish themselves as benchmarks for safe and sustainable growth in the next generation asset class.

data.title: Ghana Says Crypto Regulation Coming in Weeks, But Enforcement Team Still Empty
data.description:
Ghana's central bank pledged to regulate cryptocurrencies by December 2025 despite not yet hiring staff needed to enforce rules, as approximately 3 million adults representing 9% of population actively use digital currencies with $3 billion in transactions between July 2023 and June 2024.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ghana-says-crypto-regulation-coming-in-weeks-but-staff-dont-exist-yet/

data.title: It’s Happening: Confidence in Fiat Currencies Is Collapsing
data.description:
Key Insights: Take a good look at the markets in 2025, and you’ll see a chart that, just a few years ago, would have seemed impossible. With risk assets like tech stocks and crypto, and safe havens like silver and gold all marking all-time highs, confidence in fiat currencies is collapsing in real-time.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/16/its-happening-confidence-in-fiat-currencies-is-collapsing/

data.title: Bitpanda Expands to Latin America Through Partnership with Brazil’s Ondo Finance
data.description:

The collaboration will power Ondo’s new crypto offering for wealth and corporate clients, using Bitpanda’s secure, API-based infrastructure to deliver trading, custody, and liquidity services. This marks Bitpanda’s latest expansion […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitpanda-expands-to-latin-america-through-partnership-with-brazils-ondo-finance/
